calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kurt Huyenstruyt appeared via zoom for and with Paula Kovas and Daniel Pavloff (petitioner's).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated May 16, 2023 is admitted to probate. Paula Kovas and Daniel Pavloff are appointed as the Co-Executor's of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 16, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Disclosure: The assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
